title: dryopteris dicarpa
intro: Dryopteris dicarpa, also known as two-jawed fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris dicarpa include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as having potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
